title: Custom eggless cakes in North West Sydney — pickup from Riverstone
summary:
Families in Marsden Park and Schofields used to drive to Harris Park for a custom eggless cake. That changed in December 2024.

Num Nums is now at Riverstone Shopping Centre. Every cake is 100% eggless — not an option, the only option. Six sizes from 6" to 16", 15 flavours including Rasmalai and Mango, any design. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Photo references accepted.

48-hour notice minimum. That's what fresh baking takes. Free parking at the centre. Order via WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725.
keywords: custom cake North West Sydney no eggs
